subject: Gaming
title: League of Legends Worlds: A Global Spectacle
description: A fast breakdown of League of Legends Worlds: A Global Spectacle for builders.

hook.text: The LoL World Championship opening ceremony rivals the Olympics. Holograms, orchestras, and millions watching.

buildup.text: Riot Games hosts Worlds in a different country each year, filling stadiums with passionate fans.

discovery.text: Korean and Chinese teams dominate. Western teams rarely reach the finals—creating a regional rivalry.

twist.text: The 2021 finals drew 74 million peak concurrent viewers. Traditional sports leagues took notice.

climax.text: Worlds proved that esports could match traditional sports in production quality and audience size.

punchline.text: Seventy-four million viewers. Esports matched the biggest stages in sports.

quiz.question: How many peak concurrent viewers did the 2021 LoL World Championship attract?
